'''thobazhaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:measly|measly]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-b-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:measly|measly]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| thobazhaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thobazhithi|thobazhithi]] || [[word:thobazhiji|thobazhiji]] || [[word:thobazhishi|thobazhishi]] || [[word:thobazhiki|thobazhiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thobazhuthuthu|thobazhuthuthu]] || [[word:thobazhujuju|thobazhujuju]] || [[word:thobazhushushu|thobazhushushu]] || [[word:thobazhukuku|thobazhukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thobazhuthu|thobazhuthu]] || [[word:thobazhuju|thobazhuju]] || [[word:thobazhushu|thobazhushu]] || [[word:thobazhuku|thobazhuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thobazhufthuf|thobazhufthuf]] || [[word:thobazhufjuf|thobazhufjuf]] || [[word:thobazhufshuf|thobazhufshuf]] || [[word:thobazhufkuf|thobazhufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thobazhethe|thobazhethe]] || [[word:thobazheje|thobazheje]] || [[word:thobazheshe|thobazheshe]] || [[word:thobazheke|thobazheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thobazhothotho|thobazhothotho]] || [[word:thobazhojojo|thobazhojojo]] || [[word:thobazhoshosho|thobazhoshosho]] || [[word:thobazhokoko|thobazhokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thobazhotho|thobazhotho]] || [[word:thobazhojo|thobazhojo]] || [[word:thobazhosho|thobazhosho]] || [[word:thobazhoko|thobazhoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thobazhofthof|thobazhofthof]] || [[word:thobazhofjof|thobazhofjof]] || [[word:thobazhofshof|thobazhofshof]] || [[word:thobazhofkof|thobazhofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:thobazhĂŻfthĂŻf|thobazhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:thobazhĂŻfjĂŻf|thobazhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:thobazhĂŻfshĂŻf|thobazhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:thobazhĂŻfkĂŻf|thobazhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:thobazhĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|thobazhĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:thobazhĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|thobazhĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:thobazhĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|thobazhĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:thobazhĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|thobazhĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:thobazhĂŻfthĂŻf|thobazhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:thobazhĂŻfjĂŻf|thobazhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:thobazhĂŻfshĂŻf|thobazhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:thobazhĂŻfkĂŻf|thobazhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:thobazhĂŻfthĂŻf|thobazhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:thobazhĂŻfjĂŻf|thobazhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:thobazhĂŻfshĂŻf|thobazhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:thobazhĂŻfkĂŻf|thobazhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thobazhĂŠthĂŠ|thobazhĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:thobazhĂŠjĂŠ|thobazhĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:thobazhĂŠshĂŠ|thobazhĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:thobazhĂŠkĂŠ|thobazhĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thobazhathatha|thobazhathatha]] || [[word:thobazhajaja|thobazhajaja]] || [[word:thobazhashasha|thobazhashasha]] || [[word:thobazhakaka|thobazhakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thobazhatha|thobazhatha]] || [[word:thobazhaja|thobazhaja]] || [[word:thobazhasha|thobazhasha]] || [[word:thobazhaka|thobazhaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thobazhafthaf|thobazhafthaf]] || [[word:thobazhafjaf|thobazhafjaf]] || [[word:thobazhafshaf|thobazhafshaf]] || [[word:thobazhafkaf|thobazhafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:thobazhasha|thobazhasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:thobazhshĂ«sha|thobazhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thobazhrosha|thobazhrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thobazhmusha|thobazhmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:thobazhyasha|thobazhyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothobazhnkshĂ«sha|gothobazhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothobazhnkrosha|gothobazhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothobazhnkmusha|gothobazhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothobazhnkyasha|gothobazhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:thobabazhasha|thobabazhasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:thobabazhshĂ«sha|thobabazhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thobabazhrosha|thobabazhrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thobabazhmusha|thobabazhmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thobabazhyasha|thobabazhyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothobabazhnkshĂ«sha|gothobabazhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothobabazhnkrosha|gothobabazhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothobabazhnkmusha|gothobabazhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothobabazhnkyasha|gothobabazhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:thebĂŠzhasha|thebĂŠzhasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:thebĂŠzhshĂ«sha|thebĂŠzhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thebĂŠzhrosha|thebĂŠzhrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thebĂŠzhmusha|thebĂŠzhmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thebĂŠzhyasha|thebĂŠzhyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothebĂŠzhnkshĂ«sha|gothebĂŠzhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothebĂŠzhnkrosha|gothebĂŠzhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothebĂŠzhnkmusha|gothebĂŠzhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothebĂŠzhnkyasha|gothebĂŠzhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:thobfazhasha|thobfazhasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:thobfazhshĂ«sha|thobfazhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thobfazhrosha|thobfazhrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thobfazhmusha|thobfazhmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thobfazhyasha|thobfazhyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothobfazhnkshĂ«sha|gothobfazhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothobfazhnkrosha|gothobfazhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothobfazhnkmusha|gothobfazhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothobfazhnkyasha|gothobfazhnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4f6272c}}
